title: cyanea cylindrocalyx
intro: Cyanea cylindrocalyx, also known as the Hawaiian blue hibiscus, is a rare and endangered plant species native to Hawaii. This plant has been traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Cyanea cylindrocalyx include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, salves, or tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
